title: Go 1.26 and amqp091-go 1.12 Client Contract
description: A Go 1.26 service team must use amqp091-go APIs, errors, notifications, contexts, and version pins without hiding protocol meaning; reviewers reject hidden goroutine ownership, unbounded work, stale channel state, and claims that stop at a nil client error. Learners cumulatively produce a reviewed Go client API and lifecycle contract through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Pin Go 1.26.5, amqp091-go 1.12.0, AMQP 0-9-1, RabbitMQ 4.3.2, and the tested operating targets as one reviewed compatibility contract.
Classify amqp091-go methods, synchronous errors, notification channels, delivery channels, contexts, and confirmation streams by ownership and completion meaning.
Treat Delivery fields, properties, headers, and body bytes as untrusted data and validate decoded Go values before domain use.
